data.name: Dark Siren
data.detailed_description:
※Sex is not included. Please note.



"It's strange. According to the schedule, we should have already arrived at our destination..."
"God, watch over us."

As you wake up and wake up, you can see the Dark Siren wandering around inside the empty ship looking for you.
What the hell happened here?


Find the notes left by the sailors throughout the ship, uncover the truth about what happened here, and escape.
You must stay alert and look around carefully to avoid being charmed by the Dark Siren.
If you are caught and enchanted by the Dark Siren 3 times, the game will be over.


▷ Charming characters
▷ Suspenseful play
▷ Simple operation
▷ Game Mode: Normal Mode, Hard Mode, Invisible Mode
▷ Various skins that can be unlocked while playing
▷ 7 achievements

data.short_description: Be careful not to be captured by the Dark Siren, find the note left by the sailors, uncover the truth, and escape.
data.supported_languages: 韓文, 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: All newer version of Windows 10 (newer than version 1909.1350) and Windows 11 with support for DirectX 12 Agility SDK are supported.
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 12 (with Shader Model 6.6 atomics), or Vulkan (VK_KHR_shader_atomic_int64)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.short_description: Be careful not to be captured by the Dark Siren, find the note left by the sailors, uncover the truth, and escape.
data.supported_languages: Korean, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, German, Spanish - Spain, Turkish

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: All newer version of Windows 10 (newer than version 1909.1350) and Windows 11 with support for DirectX 12 Agility SDK are supported.
  • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 12 (with Shader Model 6.6 atomics), or Vulkan (VK_KHR_shader_atomic_int64)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
